strings.About_Subtitle: Sign in to Steam with an EYA token, clear Workshop subscriptions, and check account status.
strings.About_Update_AutoHint: Checks GitHub Releases automatically at startup.
strings.About_Artifact_NoAsset: Latest build: no download asset found
strings.About_NoDownloadInfo: No update is available for download yet. Check for updates first.
strings.Settings_Language_Desc: Choose the interface language. Changes take effect immediately.
strings.Settings_Theme_Desc: Choose light mode, dark mode, or follow the system setting.
strings.Settings_Data_Desc: Account history, profile pictures, cache, and logs are stored in the data folder.
strings.Steam_Progress_StoppingSteam: Steam is running. Closing it now...
strings.Steam_Progress_KillingSteam: Steam did not exit within the expected time. Ending its processes...
strings.Steam_Error_CannotStopSteam: Unable to stop Steam. It may be running with administrator. Please quit Steam manually and try again.
strings.Steam_Error_SteamExeNotFound_Format: Unable to locate the Steam executable: {0}
strings.Steam_Error_LaunchNoProcess: Unable to start Steam. The system did not create a process.
strings.Account_InMatch_Maybe: May currently be in a match.
strings.Login_Subtitle: Sign in to Steam with an EYA token.
strings.Login_Field_EyaToken_Placeholder: Input the EYA token (a JWT starting with eyAi)
strings.Login_Field_LicenseKey_Placeholder: Enter the license key and press Enter to resolve
strings.Login_Btn_ClearWorkshop_Tip: Unsubscribe from all CS2 Workshop items for this account
strings.Login_Btn_ApplyLoadout_Tip: Apply the loadout saved on the Loadout page to this account (base weapons only, no skins)
strings.Login_Btn_OneClickQuery_Tip: Validate the token and fetch the account Premier rank, CS2 level, and cooldown status
strings.Login_Loadout_EmptyPreset: The loadout is empty. Add weapons on the Loadout page first.
strings.Login_Status_HistoryLoaded_Format: Loaded account from the History page: {0}; last login: {1}.
strings.Login_Status_LoginStarted_Format: Login started. SteamID: {0}; token expires in {1}{2}.
strings.Login_Status_HistorySaved_Suffix: , and the account on the History page was updated
strings.Login_Status_HistorySaveFailed_Suffix_Fo: , but failed to update the account on the History page: {0}
strings.Login_Status_QueryDone_Format: Fetch complete: Premier rank {0}, CS2 level {1}, cooldown {2}, GC VAC {3}.
strings.Login_Error_TokenMissingSteamIdLoadout: The EYA token is missing a SteamID. The loadout cannot be changed.
strings.Login_Error_TokenMissingSteamIdQuery: The EYA token is missing a SteamID. Account status cannot be fetched.
strings.Login_Error_TokenExpiredCannotClearWorks: The EYA token has expired. Unable to unsubscribe from Workshop items.
strings.Login_Error_CannotClearWorkshopSuffix: Unable to unsubscribe from Workshop items.
strings.History_Subtitle: Accounts you log in to or fetch are saved in here automatically.
strings.History_Subtitle_Count_Format: {0} accounts in total. Accounts you log in to or fetch are saved in here automatically.
strings.History_Search_Placeholder: Search account username / profile name / Steam64
strings.History_Import_Tooltip: Read the “username----token” list from the clipboard, and select the accounts to import.
strings.History_ClearInvalid_Tooltip: Verify all accounts online one by one, and remove any invalid accounts rejected by Steam. If a network error occurs, verification of the remaining accounts will stop, but accounts already confirmed as invalid will still be removed.
strings.History_ClearAll_Tooltip: Clear all accounts from history page
strings.History_Card_QuickLogin: Log in to Steam directly with this account
strings.History_Card_Copy: Copy this account (username----token) to the clipboard
strings.History_Empty_Hint: Accounts are saved automatically after a successful login or quick fetch.
strings.History_Empty_NoMatch_Hint: Try a different keyword, or clear the search box.
strings.History_BatchExport_Tooltip: Export the selected accounts to the clipboard in "username----token" format
strings.History_ImportDialog_Summary_Format: {0} accounts detected. Select the ones to import:
strings.History_ImportDialog_Summary_WithInvalid: {0} accounts detected ({1} line(s) not recognized). Select the ones to import:
strings.History_Delete_Confirm_Few_Format: This will delete {0} ({1} total), removing only the local records and avatar cache.
strings.History_Delete_Confirm_Many_Format: This will delete {0} and {1} accounts in total, removing only the local records and avatar cache.
strings.History_ClearAll_Dialog_Content_Format: This will clear all {0} accounts from history and delete the avatar cache. This action cannot be undone.
strings.History_ClearInvalid_Dialog_Content_Form: This will test the EYA token of all {0} accounts in history online one by one, and delete those rejected by Steam.
strings.History_ClearInvalid_Dialog_Content_Note: If a network error occurs or the operation is canceled, the test will stop. However, accounts already confirmed as rejected by Steam will still be deleted.
strings.History_Status_ClipboardWriteFail: Failed to write to the clipboard. Please try again.
strings.History_Status_Exported_Many_Format: Exported {0} accounts to the clipboard (username----token, one per line).
strings.History_Status_ImportDone_Format: Import complete: {0} added, {1} updated. Syncing Steam profiles in the background...
strings.History_Status_ClipboardReadFail: Failed to read the clipboard. Please try again.
strings.History_Status_ImportNone: No importable accounts in the clipboard. The "username----token" format is required (one per line).
strings.History_Status_ImportNoneRecognized_Form: None of the {0} clipboard lines could be recognized. The "username----token" format is required (one per line).
strings.History_Status_NoneToDelete: No accounts are available for deletion.
strings.History_Status_LoginPageNotReady: The login page is not initialized yet. Please return to the login page first.
strings.History_Status_MissingAccountName: This history record is missing a username and cannot be used to log in.
strings.History_Status_NoneToClear: No accounts are available to clear.
strings.History_Status_NoneToTest: No accounts are available for testing.
strings.History_Status_TestNetworkErr_Format: Testing stopped due to a network error ({0} tested): {1}. No accounts were deleted, and untested accounts were retained.
strings.History_Status_TestNetworkErr_WithRemove: Testing stopped due to a network error ({0} tested): {1}. {2} accounts rejected by Steam were deleted, and untested accounts were retained.
strings.History_Status_TestCanceled_Format: Testing canceled ({0} tested). No accounts were deleted.
strings.History_Status_TestCanceled_WithRemoved_: Testing canceled ({0} tested). {1} accounts rejected by Steam were deleted, and untested accounts were retained.
strings.History_Status_TestDone_AllValid_Format: Testing complete. All {0} accounts are valid. No accounts were deleted.
strings.History_Status_TestDone_WithRemoved_Form: Testing complete: {0} tested, {1} invalid accounts rejected by Steam were deleted.
strings.History_Status_QueryDone_Format: {0} fetch complete: Premier rank {1}, CS2 level {2}, cooldown {3}, GC VAC {4}.
strings.Cached_Empty_NoMatch_Hint: Try a different keyword, or clear the search box.
strings.Cached_Empty_None_Hint: Sign in to all your Steam accounts first, then log in via EYA — all your Steam account will be cached automatically.
strings.Cached_Summary_Count_Format: {0} cached accounts in total. All Steam accounts detected before signing in with EYA are cached here.
strings.Cached_Summary_Empty: Steam accounts that were detected before signing in with EYA will be cached here.
strings.Cached_Refresh_Fail_Format: Failed to refresh cached account profiles: {0}
strings.Cached_Restore_NoSelection: Select a cached account to restore login first.
strings.Cached_Restore_Success_Format: Requested restore login of cached account: {0} (SteamID: {1}).
strings.Cached_Clear_None: No cached accounts are available to clear.
strings.Cached_Clear_Dialog_Content_Format: This will clear {0} cached account(s) and delete their avatar cache. This action cannot be undone.
strings.Cached_Delete_NoSelection: Select at least one cached account to delete.
strings.Cached_Delete_Dialog_Many_Format: This will delete {1} cached accounts, including {0}. Only local cache records and avatars will be removed.
strings.Cached_Delete_Dialog_Few_Format: This will delete {0} ({1} total). Only local cache records and avatars will be removed.
strings.Account_Error_HistoryFileUnreadable: The account history file is temporarily unavailable. It may be in use by antivirus software or cloud synchronization. This operation has been canceled, and no data has been changed. Please try again later.
strings.Workshop_Progress_GettingSubscriptions: Getting the list of subscribed Workshop items...
strings.Workshop_Progress_NoSubscriptions: No Workshop subscriptions found for CS2.
strings.Workshop_Error_RedirectNoLocation: Steam returned a redirect response without a target URL. The session may have expired. Please sign in again.
strings.Workshop_Error_TooManyRedirects: Steam returned too many redirects. The session may have expired. Please sign in again.
strings.Workshop_Error_RedirectedExternal: The session may have expired or the token may have been rejected, as Steam redirected to an external URL. Please sign in again.
strings.Cm_Error_TokenRevoked: The EYA token was rejected by Steam and may have been manually revoked.
strings.Cm_Error_TokenExpired: The EYA token has expired according to Steam.
strings.Cm_Error_TokenRejected: The EYA token was rejected by Steam and may have been revoked or become invalid.
strings.Cm_Error_CannotConnect_Format: Unable to connect to the Steam server. {0}
strings.Cm_Error_GetAccessTokenFailed: Failed to get the web access token
strings.Cm_Error_AccessTokenEmpty: The web access token returned by Steam is empty.
strings.Cm_Error_DuplicateGcWaiter: A wait operation for the same GC message already exists.
strings.Cm_Error_RequestQueueFailed: Failed to create the Steam request queue.
strings.Cm_Error_ServerListMalformed: The Steam CM server list response is malformed.
strings.Cm_Error_NoWebSocketServers: Steam did not return any available WebSocket CM servers.
strings.Cm_Error_ConnectTimeout_Format: The connection to Steam CM {0} timed out.
strings.Cm_Error_ConnectionClosed: The Steam CM connection has been closed.
strings.Cm_Error_NonProtobufLogon: Steam CM returned a non-protobuf logon response.
strings.Cm_Error_SessionReplaced: The Steam CM connection was superseded. This account may currently be active in the Steam client or CS2. Please fully exit CS2 and Steam, then perform the operation again in SteamEYA.
strings.Cm_Error_AccountLoggedOff: The Steam account has been logged off.
strings.License_Error_InvalidKeyOrServer: The license key is invalid or the wrong upstream server was selected.
strings.License_Error_WrongKeyOrServer: The license key is incorrect or the wrong upstream server was selected.
strings.License_Error_ResponseTooShort: The upstream server returned a response that is too short.
strings.License_Error_NoAccountData: The upstream JSON contains no account data.
strings.License_Error_MissingField_Format: The upstream JSON is missing a field: {0}
strings.License_Error_EmptyField_Format: The upstream JSON field is empty: {0}
strings.Jwt_Status_MissingSteamId: The EYA token is missing a SteamID.
strings.Jwt_Status_MissingExpiry: The EYA token is missing an expiry time.
strings.Jwt_Status_BadFormat: The EYA token format is invalid.
strings.Jwt_Status_Unparseable: The EYA token could not be processed.
strings.Jwt_Status_NotSteamToken: The EYA token is not a Steam token.
strings.Jwt_Status_MissingClientAudience: The EYA token is missing the client audience.
strings.Jwt_Status_EmptySteamId: The SteamID in the EYA token is empty.
strings.Jwt_Status_ExpiryUnparseable: The EYA token expiry time could not be processed.
strings.Jwt_Status_NotYetValid: The EYA token is not yet valid.
strings.Cs_Premier_BadSteam64: Invalid Steam64 ID; cannot fetch premier rank.
strings.Cs_Premier_NoProfile: The CS2 GC did not return an account profile.
strings.Cs_Loadout_Busy: A loadout task is already running. Please wait until it has finished, then try again.
strings.Cs_Loadout_BadSteam64: Invalid Steam64 ID; cannot modify the loadout.
strings.Cs_Loadout_CmDisconnected: The Steam CM connection was disconnected. Try fully exiting CS2 and Steam first, then apply the loadout in SteamEYA.
strings.Cs_Gc_ConnectTimeout: Connection timed out to the CS2 Game Coordinator.
strings.Login_Action_ClearWorkshop: Unsubscribe from all CS2 Workshop items
strings.Login_Status_SkippedOnlineValidation_For: Couldn't reach Steam's validation service; skipped online validation and continued to {0}.
strings.Cs_Loadout_SoTimeout: Timed out waiting for the loadout (SO) update.
strings.Loadout_Subtitle: Drag weapons from the pool below into the slots above; drag an equipped slot to reposition; click to remove. One loadout per account, saved automatically and applied from the Login page.
strings.Cs_Premier_CooldownUnknown: Cooldown status unknown (GC didn't respond; try again later)
strings.Update_EmptyResponse: GitHub Releases returned an empty response.
strings.Steam_Error_TokenEncryptFailed: Failed to encrypt the EYA token.
strings.Steam_Error_VdfReadFailed_Format: Could not read {0}. The operation was stopped to avoid overwriting the existing Steam configuration. {1}
strings.Steam_Error_Vdf_TrailingContent: The VDF file contains extra content that could not be processed.
strings.Steam_Error_Vdf_MissingValue: A VDF key is missing its value.
strings.Steam_Error_Vdf_UnterminatedString: The VDF contains an unterminated quoted string.
strings.Cm_Proto_VarintTooLong: The protobuf varint is too long.
strings.Cm_Proto_WireTypeMismatch_Format: protobuf wire type mismatch: actual {0}, expected {1}.
